description: Inverse square law of illuminance: inspection flashlight powers on, beam cone widens rightward; 8 constant rays pass through a bright unit target (A) at d = 1 m / 1,000 lx and a 2x2 grid target (4A) at 2d = 2 m / 250 lx with a visibly dimmer disc. E = I/d2 formula chip and AREA x4 -> LUX / 4 callout.
